title: isometrum leucanthum
intro: Isometrum leucanthum, also known as the white isometrum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isometrum leucanthum are thought to include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Isometrum leucanthum is typically used as a dried leaf or root extract, often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, or topical applications.
